directive: Rebuild the angle around the published model. Let e_t(x,s)=P(A=t|X=x,S=s), mu_{st}(x)=E[Y|X=x,S=s,A=t], v_t^-(x)=mu_{1t}(x)/(1+gamma), v_t^+(x)=(1+gamma)mu_{1t}(x), w_t^-(x)=e_t(x,0)mu_{0t}(x)+e_{1-t}(x,0)mu_{0t}(x)/(1+rho), and w_t^+(x)=e_t(x,0)mu_{0t}(x)+e_{1-t}(x,0)(1+rho)mu_{0t}(x). State Lanners et al.’s exact comparator H_t=min(v_t^+,w_t^+)-max(v_t^-,w_t^-) and G_t^{LRVP}=E[H_t(X)], with published compatibility requiring G_t^{LRVP}>=0 separately for t=0,1. For latent-law feasibility, assume standard-Borel X, consistency, trial randomization, bounded positive outcomes [a,b], and uniform positivity of pi(x) and every e_t(x,s) in both studies. Introduce the observational missing-arm mean c_t(x)=E[Y(t)|X=x,S=0,A=1-t] with c_t in [a,b] intersect [mu_{0t}/(1+rho),(1+rho)mu_{0t}], impose the mandatory mixture q_{t0}=e_t(x,0)mu_{0t}+e_{1-t}(x,0)c_t, and require q_{t0} in [a,b] intersect [mu_{1t}/(1+gamma),(1+gamma)mu_{1t}]. Equivalently, clip the published w interval through the admissible c_t interval and clip v to [a,b]; call the resulting endpoints W_t^-,W_t^+,V_t^-,V_t^+ and define C_P(rho,gamma)=max_t E[(max(V_t^-,W_t^-)-min(V_t^+,W_t^+))_+]. Prove M(P,rho,gamma) is nonempty iff C_P=0. Sufficiency must use a measurable midpoint selector q_t from the interval intersection, recover c_t=(q_t-e_t mu_{0t})/e_{1-t}, and explicitly extend the observed kernel: in S=1 copy the observed arm-t outcome distribution to Y(t) in both assignment arms to obtain randomization and consistency; in S=0 retain Y(A)=Y and draw each missing potential outcome from an [a,b]-supported two-point endpoint law with mean c_t. Couple missing potentials conditionally independently, establishing one joint Q rather than merely armwise means. Replace the old witness by X in {x1,x2}, P(x1)=3/5, e_t(x,0)=1/2, [a,b]=[1/4,8], rho=gamma=1, with (mu_{00},mu_{10})=(4,1/2) at x1 and (4,4) at x2; then H_0(x1)=-2, H_0(x2)=3, so G_0^{LRVP}=0 although C_P>=6/5. Set mu_{01}=mu_{11}=1 in both strata, giving H_1=3/4, so the published armwise comparator accepts while exact feasibility fails. Demote rho=gamma=0 equality to a sanity corollary. Define C_P first as an observed-law functional, independently of estimation. For inference, specify foldwise series-logit learners for pi and e_t(.,s) and bounded least-squares series learners for mu_{st}, with compact X, covariate density bounded above and away from zero, uniformly bounded Hölder-beta nuisance balls, beta>d/2, deterministic basis dimension K_n satisfying K_n log n/n=o(1), K_n^{-beta/d}=o(n^{-1/4}), uniformly bounded/truncated fits, and foldwise uniform L2 rates whose relevant mu-by-propensity products are o(n^{-1/2}); give VC-type entropy and variance/nondegeneracy conditions for the score class. Use cross-fitted orthogonal scores with inputs (hat pi, hat e_t(.,s), hat mu_{st}) and a numerical directional-delta/contact-set multiplier bootstrap that permits positive-mass endpoint and arm ties. State uniform coverage and the local separation problem only over this primitive law class, never through an infimum over unrestricted learners.

Apply one atomic consistency-preserving revision: delete the ass:mandatory-mixture assumption object and its Assumptions-section environment; insert a preliminary lemma labeled lem:observational-mixture-identity stating that every observed extension Q satisfying consistency obeys q_{t0}(X)=e_t(X,0)mu_{0t}(X)+e_{1-t}(X,0)c_t(X) P_X-almost surely for each t, with proof E_Q[Y(t)|X,S=0]=sum_{a in {t,1-t}}Q(A=a|X,S=0)E_Q[Y(t)|X,S=0,A=a], followed by observed extension to identify the weights with e_a, consistency plus observed extension to identify the A=t conditional mean with mu_{0t}, and the definition of c_t for A=1-t; remove ass:mandatory-mixture from def:latent-class construction and by_member_properties without replacing it by any member condition; add lem:observational-mixture-identity to thm:exact-compatibility.depends_on, add the lemma to the used_by arrays of ass:observed-extension and ass:consistency, and remove every remaining used_by, depends_on, prose, latent-class, or proof-route reference that treats ass:mandatory-mixture as assumed; in the exact-compatibility necessity proof explicitly invoke the lemma to map c_t in [C_t^-,C_t^+] into q_{t0} in [W_t^-,W_t^+] before intersecting with [V_t^-,V_t^+], and in the sufficiency proof retain the same identity to verify that the selector c_t^star and the constructed observed extension produce q_{t0}=q_t^star; update the iteration trail and honest-scope wording only to record this derivational repair, leaving all envelopes, C_P, K(P), the witness, theorem claims, inference question, and field-tier novelty characterization unchanged.

Adopt one root angle everywhere: Lanners et al. already derive pointwise population interval-feasibility inequalities for their partial-identification bounds, whereas G_t^{LRVP}=E[H_t^{LRVP}(X)] is their practical signed-average operational proxy. State the advance as: an observed-law necessary-and-sufficient characterization for existence of one support-respecting latent causal extension, an explicit measurable extension construction, and a demonstrated correction to the signed-average proxy, which can accept through cross-stratum cancellation. Never say that Lanners et al. omit pointwise inequalities or that G_t^{LRVP}>=0 is their population exact-compatibility theorem.
Rewrite Theorem 1 so its iff statement remains M(P,rho,gamma) nonempty iff C_P(rho,gamma)=0, but replace 'strictly tightens the published rule' with: it packages the paper's pointwise interval requirements into an exact common-latent-extension characterization, including support clipping, the observational mixture identity, measurable selectors, and an explicit joint extension; its zero-set test strictly refines only the practical signed-average G proxy. Describe the pointwise overlap condition as equivalent to vanishing of each nonnegative conditional violation almost surely, while C_P is its observed-law scalarization.
Propagate that distinction verbatim in the introduction gap, results-at-a-glance gap, tldr, project_justification, related_work, honest_scope, and comparator_promise_table. The Lanners comparator row must say that Section 4/Lemma 1/Theorem 1/Remark 1 impose pointwise interval inequalities for population feasibility and that Appendix D/E.3 uses G(t) as a practical expectation proxy; match Theorem 1 to the exact latent-extension characterization and Proposition 1 to failure of the proxy. Replace all phrases such as 'published exact rule', 'average before checking compatibility', or 'Lanners require only G>=0' accordingly.
Complete P^{can} as a probability law by adding, for every j in {1,2}, s in {0,1}, and t in {0,1}, Y conditional on X=x_j,S=s,A=t distributed as nu_{mu_st(x_j)}, where nu_m places probabilities (b-m)/(b-a) and (m-a)/(b-a) at a and b. Retain the stated X law and P(S=s,A=t|X=x_j)=1/4, which imply pi=1/2 and e_t(x_j,s)=1/2. Explicitly note that all listed means lie in [1/4,8], so every kernel is valid and all positivity conditions hold.
Recheck and state the witness arithmetic exactly. For t=0 at x_1, the published trial interval is [1/4,1], the observational mixture interval is [3,6], and H_0=-2. At x_2 they are [2,8] and [3,6], so H_0=3. Therefore G_0=(3/5)(-2)+(2/5)(3)=0. For t=1 at either stratum, the intervals are [1/2,2] and [3/4,3/2], so H_1=3/4 and G_1=3/4. Support clipping changes none of these endpoints. The exact conditional violation is 2 at x_1 and 0 at x_2 for arm 0, and 0 for arm 1; hence C_{P^{can}}(1,1)=max{(3/5)2,0}=6/5 exactly, not merely at least 6/5, and the iff theorem gives M(P^{can},1,1)=empty.
Make the model class primitive and n-independent. Define a class P_bar containing observed laws P whose covariate support is compact, whose covariate density is bounded above and away from zero, whose study and treatment propensities satisfy the stated uniform positivity bounds, and whose pi, e_t(.,s), and mu_st belong to the stated fixed Holder balls, together with bounded outcomes. If triangular arrays are retained, write P_n in P_bar; do not put K_n, learner rates, score entropy, variance lower bounds, numerical-delta steps, bootstrap repetitions, grids, or tolerances in the definition of P_bar or call those properties of P.
Move sieve growth and foldwise product-rate requirements into a separately labelled inference-construction/performance block. Specify a deterministic tensor-product spline or compactly supported wavelet basis p_K(x) on the compact support, including order at least ceiling(beta), normalization, K=K_n, and the exact truncated series-logit and bounded series least-squares fits used on each training complement. State K_n log n/n=o(1), K_n^{-beta/d}=o(n^{-1/4}), the foldwise L2 rates, and r_mu,n(r_e,n+r_pi,n)=o(n^{-1/2}) as sufficient performance conditions for that construction, not as causal or primitive law assumptions.
Replace the undefined active-score class by an explicit construction. For theta=(rho,gamma), arm t, lower face ell in {V_t^-,W_t^-}, and upper face u in {V_t^+,W_t^+}, define the cross-fitted orthogonal observation-level score as the plug-in face contrast ell(X;theta)-u(X;theta) plus the corresponding inverse-probability residual corrections for every mu_st and propensity component entering that face. Define S_n^{act} as the finite or indexed collection of these centered scores for faces attaining the lower maximum, upper minimum, positive-part contact, and outer arm maximum at theta, with ties retaining every attaining face. Give the residual-correction formulas or an unambiguous pathwise-derivative formula evaluated using the stated basis learners; do not leave 'form orthogonal scores' as prose.
Treat entropy and nondegeneracy as sufficient bootstrap-performance conditions on the now-defined score collection generated by the construction. State the metric, envelope, uniform quantifiers over P in P_bar and theta, and whether zero-variance faces are removed, studentized with a stated floor, or covered by a separate deterministic rule. Do not silently exclude positive-mass envelope or arm ties, because those ties are part of the open question.
Fully define the numerical directional-delta multiplier bootstrap. Specify iid mean-zero unit-variance multipliers, the cross-fitted empirical score process, a deterministic perturbation delta_n tending to zero with its required relation to n and nuisance error, the directional finite-difference map applied to the max/min/positive-part/outer-max functional, and the conditional (1-alpha)-quantile c_hat_{1-alpha} of the supremum over the declared theta index set. If computation uses a grid, define a deterministic grid Theta_n with mesh tending to zero and state the interpolation or approximation requirement as a construction condition.
Define the estimator and inversion explicitly: C_hat_n(theta) is the cross-fitted plug-in/orthogonal estimate of C_P(theta); the test statistic is the stated studentized or unstudentized directional-delta statistic; and K_hat_{n,1-alpha} is the set of theta in the full rectangle, or its declared grid approximation, for which the one-sided test of C_P(theta)=0 is not rejected using c_hat_{1-alpha}. State the simultaneous outer-coverage event K(P) subset K_hat and the random-set measurability convention. Then pose the OeQ conditionally: under the primitive class plus these construction/performance conditions, can the procedure attain uniform coverage and level at positive-mass face and arm ties, and what are its regular local separation rate and power? Do not assume the desired Gaussian approximation, tie-validity, coverage, or separation result.
Consistency-edit proto-core dependencies and prose after these changes: rename def:uniform-class to the primitive P_bar class; make def:inference-handle depend on the basis, folds, learners, score formulas, multipliers, delta_n, critical value, and inversion; remove algorithmic assumptions from by_member_properties; update every used_by/depends_on link; add symbols for theta, basis p_K, multipliers, delta_n, grid/mesh if used, bootstrap process, standardization, and critical value; and delete or redefine every orphaned K_n, entropy, rate, or score symbol. Preserve the existing causal assumptions, bounded positive outcome scale, two-study target K(P), exact iff theorem, cancellation proposition, and open tie-valid inference problem.

Produce one synchronized v5 as follows: relabel thm:exact-compatibility, unchanged in target and substantive content, as headline Conjecture 1 (NOT YET PROVED); extract its routine necessity implication C_P(theta)>0 implies M(P,theta)=empty as a proved proposition derived from the observational-mixture identity and interval restrictions, and make the cancellation proposition invoke only that proved necessity result, never the conjectured sufficiency direction. Retain the zero-sensitivity statement only as an algebraic sanity check for K(P), without treating it as independent novelty. Define Q exclusively on (X,S,A,Y(0),Y(1)); replace ass:observed-extension and ass:consistency everywhere by the single pushforward condition Law_Q(X,S,A,Y(A))=P; propagate this change through the symbol table, latent-class definition, mixture lemma, conjecture statement, selector-based construction, proof route, scope flags, and every Q-marginal reference. Add HongLi2018, Han Hong and Jessie Li, 'The Numerical Delta Method,' Journal of Econometrics 206 (2018), 379-394, to the bibliography, related work, comparator table, inference-question gap, and proof route; describe its finite-difference numerical derivative bootstrap as one ingredient combined with Fang-Santos directional analysis, contact selection, and cross-fitted nuisance linearization, while explicitly retaining uniform tie-inclusive learned-nuisance coverage, testing, and local power as Open-ended Question 1. Regenerate every fixed proposal.tex section from this corrected proto-core, preserve the FIELD target, and do not add the optional sharp-effect corollary or any regularity, margin, contact-set, or bootstrap-validity assumption that would encode the open inference conclusion.

This is the single main validity-gate-authorized root-change retry. Rewrite the angle artifact-wide to the actual published Lanners--Rudin--Volfovsky--Parikh sensitivity model, preserving auto mode and the locked FIELD novelty floor.

1. Replace every reciprocal lower endpoint, without exception, by the published linear lower endpoint. For all x and t and rho,gamma in [0,1], define the support-clipped NUC endpoints C_t^-(x;rho)=max{a,(1-rho)mu_{0t}(x)} and C_t^+(x;rho)=min{b,(1+rho)mu_{0t}(x)}; define the support-clipped study-exchangeability endpoints V_t^-(x;gamma)=max{a,(1-gamma)mu_{1t}(x)} and V_t^+(x;gamma)=min{b,(1+gamma)mu_{1t}(x)}; and define W_t^pm(x;rho)=e_t(x,0)mu_{0t}(x)+e_{1-t}(x,0)C_t^pm(x;rho). Make the parameter rectangle exactly [0,1]^2 unless a separately named non-published extension is excluded from all comparator claims.
2. State Lanners A3 faithfully as joint randomization (Y(0),Y(1)) independent of A conditional on X,S=1. Remove every marginal-only formulation Y(t) independent of A and every claim that it is the published assumption. Keep the precise pushforward observed-extension condition Law_Q(X,S,A,Y(A))=P.
3. Perform an artifact-wide consistency rewrite: assumptions, symbols, definitions, latent class, compatibility functional, conjecture/propositions, proof routes, dependencies, used_by edges, honest-scope flags, tldr, introduction, project justification, related work, comparator table, iteration trail, rendered proposal, and all formulas/examples must contain no mu/(1+rho), mu/(1+gamma), reciprocal-lower-endpoint prose, or marginal-only trial-randomization residue.
4. Recompute the cancellation witness FROM SCRATCH under the corrected published endpoints and joint-randomization model. Specify a complete observed probability law with valid outcome kernels and positivity; calculate every support-clipped C,V,W interval, every conditional signed-overlap H_t, G_t=E[H_t(X)], every nonnegative conditional violation, and C_P exactly. The witness must genuinely show the published practical signed-average proxy accepts while exact no-cancellation compatibility fails. Do not copy or assume any v1-v5 witness number. Verify all arithmetic and all latent/observed-law conditions.
5. Preserve the honest result classification: the full common-extension iff remains a headline conjecture unless proved; any proved cancellation consequence may use only proved necessity, never conjectured sufficiency. Preserve the Hong--Li/Fang--Santos positioning and keep tie-inclusive learned-nuisance inference explicitly open.
6. If no valid corrected witness exists, or if the corrected package cannot honestly meet FIELD novelty, report that failure in the handoff rather than substituting a different model, weakening the floor, inventing arithmetic, or adding crux-encoding assumptions. There will be no further retry of angle 0.

Perform exactly one literature-only consistency revision of authoritative proto_core.json, then rerun D-0.5. Do not alter the mathematical model, estimand, assumptions, definitions, statements, dependencies, proof status, inference construction, FIELD target, or recomputed witness. In particular preserve the published linear support-clipped endpoints, theta=[0,1]^2, joint trial randomization, G_0^{LRVP}=0, G_1^{LRVP}=1, the sole 9/8 violation at x_1, C_{Pcan}(1,1)=9/10, and the OPEN status of both exact-compatibility sufficiency and tie-inclusive inference.

Apply these literature repairs atomically across every literature-facing field:
1. Correct every external attribution to Lanners et al.: the relevant Section 4 population results are Lemma 4 and Theorem 4, with Remark 1. Replace all external “Lemma 1”/“Theorem 1” anchors in related_work, comparator_promise_table, project positioning, introduction/results annotations, and literature checklist. Do not alter internal numbers for this proposal's own lemmas, propositions, or questions.
2. Add bibliography key YuKarmakarVandeleestSchwarz2024 with the primary-source-correct citation: R. Yu, B. Karmakar, J. Vandeleest, and E. B. Schwarz, “Using a Two-Parameter Sensitivity Analysis Framework to Efficiently Combine Randomized and Non-randomized Studies,” arXiv:2412.03731, 2024. Do not assert later publication status unless directly supported by a cited primary record.
3. Add Yu et al. to related_work, the concise project summary/tldr as appropriate, project_justification gap/niche/fill positioning, the literature checklist/handoff, and comparator_promise_table.
4. State the distinction precisely and without overclaiming: Yu et al. already use triplet matching and two sensitivity parameters for internal and external bias to combine randomized and non-randomized studies. Therefore do not claim novelty for having two parameters or combining those study types. The present narrower question concerns whether the particular corrected Lanners interval restrictions are jointly realizable by one support-respecting latent causal law, the observed-law no-cancellation zero functional and explicit cancellation witness, and tie-inclusive learned-nuisance inference for that compatibility zero set. Do not generically claim Yu et al. lacks compatibility or sensitivity analysis.
5. Add comparator_promise_table entry matched to Open-ended Question 1 with match_kind downgraded_to_informed_by and claim: Yu et al. use triplet matching and two internal/external-bias sensitivity parameters, but do not characterize the observed-law support-clipped region admitting one common latent causal extension.
6. Run an artifact-wide literature-anchor check so no Lanners “Lemma 1/Theorem 1” external attribution remains and YuKarmakarVandeleestSchwarz2024 is present in bibliography, related_work, project positioning, literature checklist, and comparator table.
